candidate_definitions.text: LuaRocks is the package manager for the Lua programming language.
Snippet Engine for Neovim written in Lua.
🌒 Neovim plugin management inspired by Cargo, powered by luarocks

A repository for hosting auto-generated Neovim plugins and tree-sitter parsers for Luarocks.
The NURR hosts and automatically packages Neovim Luarocks releases for many plugins
SQLite LuaJIT binding with a very simple api.
Reliable Neotest adapter for running Go tests in Neovim.
Plugin to improve viewing Markdown files in Neovim
Lua implementation of Project Fluent https://projectfluent.org
Neotest adapter for running busted tests using neovim as a lua interpreter
